content: We can reframe active memory management in LLM agents as an intrinsically motivated exploration problem: just as ICM rewards agents for exploring uncharted environmental states, an ICM-augmented Memory-R1 framework can reward the agent for actively seeking out and filling gaps in its existing memory across the six core knowledge extraction vectors.
source_topics: memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
trigger_topic: memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
